name: Steel cannonball
rationale: Terminal ammo output; under inputs-only it leaves Mining + Smithing and sits in Range and Slayer.

name: Ammo mould
rationale: A reusable Smithing tool; dropped Quests per the quest-tool policy.

name: Red vine worm
rationale: Quest-only bait, no role in normal Fishing; removed Fishing.
comments: Good call with no uses outside of quests

name: Bronze arrowtips
rationale: A smithing output whose only next step is fletching, so Fletching only.

name: Oak shortbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, not wieldable until strung, so Fletching only.

name: Ice arrows
rationale: A Temple of Ikov quest curiosity, not standard ammo; removed Range.
comments: This was a tricky one, good call. This will go for the fire arrows from the temple of Ikov quest as well

name: Strength potion(4)
rationale: Boosts Strength for melee, so Herblore and Melee.

name: Prayer potion(3)
rationale: Restores Prayer; made in Herblore, a Prayer consumable and a slayer staple.

name: Grimy marrentill
rationale: A grimy herb is a farmed output and a herblore input; added Farming.

name: Guam leaf
rationale: A clean herb comes from cleaning, not harvesting, so Herblore only.

name: Sardine
rationale: Cooked food eaten in any style, so Cooking plus all four combat tabs.

name: Giant carp
rationale: A Fishing Contest quest item, not a normal food, so Quests.

name: Edible seaweed
rationale: Cooked into soda ash for glass; trivial 4 HP, not treated as combat food.

name: Oyster pearl
rationale: Fishing loot fletched into bolt tips; not used in jewellery, so removed Crafting.

name: Clay
rationale: Mined then used in pottery, never smelted, so Crafting only.

name: Silver ore
rationale: Smelted into a bar; the bar, not the ore, is the Crafting input.

name: 'perfect' gold ore
rationale: A quest-only ore used solely in Family Crest, so Quests.

name: Bones
rationale: Buried to train Prayer, a Prayer input.

name: Chaos rune
rationale: Runecraftable at the Chaos altar; added Runecraft, which the prior pass missed.

name: Fire orb
rationale: A charged orb attached to a battlestaff for Crafting experience, so Crafting.

name: Gnome amulet
rationale: An obscure quest reward amulet with minor defence, not a real loadout piece, so Quests.

name: Pink hat
rationale: A Fine Fashions hat with only a trivial magic bonus, sold as fashion, so Cosmetics.

name: Blurite sword
rationale: An equippable longsword; by function Melee, dropped Quests.

name: Holy water
rationale: An equippable thrown demonbane weapon; by function Range.
